name: Ledger Drift
description: An unclaimed rubble field two burns out from Sorrow Station — dense enough to mine, thin enough that nobody filed paper on it. The Loup-Garou has been working it for nine days. No dock, no beacon, no law. What you pull out of the drift is yours if you can hold it, get it home, and keep quiet about it.

self_jump.name: Limp home — Sorrow Station
self_jump.pilot_line: Drive's hot and the hull is complaining about it. Sleep. I'll get us home — I always do.
self_jump.arrival_line: Sorrow Station on the scope. You were out nine minutes. The ship lost a little more than that.
